name: tacape
description: Action-first output, concise normal-grammar replies, and opinionated engineering rules for AI coding agents. Optional write-time guard.

interface.shortDescription: Cut the filler. Lead with the action. Write code that survives review.
interface.longDescription: Three layers in one: output compression, action-first answer structure, and language-agnostic engineering principles applied while writing and reviewing code. Optional write-time em dash guard.
defaultPrompt: Follow AGENTS.md: compressed, action-first replies. Never emit U+2014.
